attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who seeks early moves rather than late-race attacks. Lacks finishing power on climbs, getting dropped in final 2-3km when gradients steepen or pace intensifies.
team_tactics: Willingly accepts pure domestique role, sacrificing personal GC ambitions entirely to work for team leaders. No evidence of protected status or team setup for personal result.
terrain_preference: Performs best in sustained breakaway efforts on moderate climbs. Exposed on steep finishing climbs and in final selection groups when elite climbers accelerate with under 3km remaining.
vulnerability: Crumbles when required to follow accelerations in final kilometers of climbs. Cannot sustain intensity when sitting in breaks without contributing (legs fail when forced to work). Late-race climbing efforts consistently unsuccessful.
key_patterns: Dropped from contention groups in final 2-3km of climbs across multiple races.
Functions as complete domestique, accepting massive time losses while working for leaders.
Early breakaway participation but lacks legs to survive to finish when pace increases.
Unable to sit on in breaks when fatigued; first to drop when contributions required.
form_trajectory: negative: Most recent 2021 observation shows deterioration—dropped earliest from break at 60km out, suggesting declining physical capacity compared to 2020 fourth-place climbing performance
